member.name: T:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus
member.summary: Type-safe event bus supporting synchronous dispatch, queued dispatch, and priority-ordered handlers.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus.QueuedCount
member.summary: The number of events currently in the queue.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus.SubscriptionCount
member.summary: The total number of active subscriptions across all event types.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus.Unsubscribe(Bezoro.Events.Types.SubscriptionHandle)
member.summary: Removes a subscription by its handle.
member.returns: true if the subscription was found and removed; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus.Publish``1(``0)
member.summary: Publishes an event synchronously, invoking all matching handlers inline.
member.returns: The context after all handlers have run (check ).

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus.FlushQueued
member.summary: Dispatches all queued events in order.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus.Subscribe``1(System.Action{Bezoro.Events.Types.EventContext{``0}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Subscribes a handler to events of type . Higher priority handlers run first. Same-priority handlers run in subscription order.
member.returns: A handle that can be used to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus.Enqueue``1(``0)
member.summary: Enqueues an event for deferred dispatch via .

member.name: T:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IUnityEventBuses
member.summary: Aggregates update-phase event buses commonly used in Unity-style game loops.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IUnityEventBuses.FixedUpdate
member.summary: Event bus flushed during FixedUpdate.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IUnityEventBuses.LateUpdate
member.summary: Event bus flushed during LateUpdate.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IUnityEventBuses.Update
member.summary: Event bus flushed during Update.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IUnityEventBuses.FlushFixedUpdate
member.summary: Flushes queued events from the FixedUpdate bus.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IUnityEventBuses.FlushLateUpdate
member.summary: Flushes queued events from the LateUpdate bus.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IUnityEventBuses.FlushUpdate
member.summary: Flushes queued events from the Update bus.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Events.Services.EventBus
member.summary: Thread-safe event bus with priority-ordered handlers, cancellable propagation, synchronous inline dispatch, and queued deferred dispatch.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Events.Services.UnityEventBuses
member.summary: Default implementation of backed by instances.
member.remarks: Creates Unity event buses backed by the provided instances.
member.param: Whether this instance should dispose the provided buses.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Services.UnityEventBuses.#ctor(Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus,Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus,Bezoro.Events.Abstractions.IEventBus,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Default implementation of backed by instances.
member.remarks: Creates Unity event buses backed by the provided instances.
member.param: Whether this instance should dispose the provided buses.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Services.UnityEventBuses.#ctor
member.summary: Creates Unity event buses backed by new instances.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Events.Types.EventContext`1
member.summary: Context wrapper passed to event handlers, carrying the event data and a cancellation flag.
member.remarks: Creates a new event context wrapping the specified event data.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Types.EventContext`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Context wrapper passed to event handlers, carrying the event data and a cancellation flag.
member.remarks: Creates a new event context wrapping the specified event data.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Events.Types.EventContext`1.Data
member.summary: The event data.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Events.Types.EventContext`1.Handled
member.summary: Set to true to stop further handlers from processing this event.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Events.Types.EventSubscription
member.summary: Internal record of a single event subscription.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Types.EventSubscription.#ctor(Bezoro.Events.Types.SubscriptionHandle,System.Int32,System.Delegate)
member.summary: Internal record of a single event subscription.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Events.Types.QueuedEvent
member.summary: Type-erased wrapper for a queued event, capturing the dispatch action.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Types.QueuedEvent.#ctor(System.Action)
member.summary: Type-erased wrapper for a queued event, capturing the dispatch action.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Events.Types.SubscriptionHandle
member.summary: Lightweight handle identifying an event subscription.
member.remarks: Creates a new subscription handle with the specified id.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Events.Types.SubscriptionHandle.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Lightweight handle identifying an event subscription.
member.remarks: Creates a new subscription handle with the specified id.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Events.Types.SubscriptionHandle.None
member.summary: Represents an invalid/uninitialized handle.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Events.Types.SubscriptionHandle.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for this subscription.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Events.Types.SubscriptionHandle.IsValid
member.summary: Whether this handle represents a valid subscription.
